request.query: Acme AI Notes launch reactions on X LinkedIn product hunt

response.answer: Early social launch chatter shows mostly positive interest with a few repeated concerns around pricing, privacy, and onboarding clarity.

results.title: Builders praise the launch but ask about pricing — Social launch chatter
results.snippet: Users say the workflow looks useful and fast, but several comments ask whether the paid plan is too expensive for small teams.
results.content: Positive launch reaction. Useful automation, clean setup, fast results. Pricing concern appears repeatedly.

results.title: Privacy questions show up in social discussion
results.snippet: Teams like the product idea, but privacy and data retention questions are a blocker for some buyers.
results.content: The product is promising, but privacy, compliance, and admin controls need clearer messaging.

results.title: Unexpected use case: product teams share launch notes
results.snippet: Several users mention using the product to summarize customer calls and turn them into launch follow-up tasks.
results.content: Useful and helpful for product marketing. Unexpected use case around launch retrospectives and customer calls.
